zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Somery III於1255年6月24日出生在英國斯塔福爾勞利 雷吉時，他的父親Ralph de Somery24歲，母親Amabilia, de Chaucombe22歲。他和Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1291年10月11日在英國斯塔福爾杜德利享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Somery III于1255年6月24日出生在英国斯塔福爾勞利 雷吉时，他的父亲Ralph de Somery24岁，母亲Amabilia, de Chaucombe22岁。他和Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1291年10月11日在英国斯塔福爾杜德利享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Somery III was born on 24 June 1255, in Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, England, his father, Ralph de Somery, was 24 and his mother, Amabilia, de Chaucombe, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel. He died on 11 October 1291, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Somery III est né le 24 juin 1255, à Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Somery, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Amabilia, de Chaucombe, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1291, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Somery III am 24. Juni 1255 in Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Somery 24 und seine Mutter Amabilia, de Chaucombe 22. Er hatte mit Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1291 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Dudley, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Somery III è nato il il 24 giugno 1255 nel Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Somery, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Amabilia, de Chaucombe, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel. Morì il 11 ottobre 1291, nel Dudley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Somery IIIが1255年6月24日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロウリー レジスで生まれた時，父Ralph de Someryは24歳，母Amabilia, de Chaucombeは22歳であった。彼はLady Agnes Lucia de Pagnelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1291年10月11日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Somery III(이)가 1255년 6월 24일 영국 스태퍼드실르 로우리 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Somery(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabilia, de Chaucombe(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1291년 10월 11일 영국 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.24 June 1255–11 October 1291: 24 de junho de 1255–11 de outubro de 1291
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Somery III nasceu em 24 de junho de 1255, em Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Somery, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Amabilia, de Chaucombe, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1291, em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Somery III родился 24 июня 1255 г. в местности роули регис, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Somery было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Amabilia, de Chaucombe, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel. Он умер 11 октября 1291 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.24 June 1255–11 October 1291: 24 de junio de 1255–11 de octubre de 1291
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Somery III nació el 24 de junio de 1255, en Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Somery, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Amabilia, de Chaucombe, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1291, en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
